ranked_movies.title: Pride and Prejudice
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed across multiple threads, with both the 1995 and 2005 versions being passionately debated. It is frequently cited as a favorite and a benchmark for the romance genre.

ranked_movies.title: La La Land
ranked_movies.reason: Explicitly mentioned as a personal favorite in the initial 'AskMen' post and again in a request for similar movies. Its bittersweet nature is appreciated.

ranked_movies.title: The Notebook
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently brought up as a polarizing film, often cited as the 'worst' or 'most overrated' romance movie, generating significant discussion.

ranked_movies.title: Stardust
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times in different contexts: as a favorite romance, for its fantasy elements, and as a film with a transformative love story.

ranked_movies.title: Notting Hill
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the thread seeking powerful female/ordinary male dynamics and also listed as a general favorite romance film.

ranked_movies.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a favorite in the 'AskMen' thread, praised for its cast and multi-dimensional plot.

ranked_movies.title: Love Actually
ranked_movies.reason: A contentious but frequently discussed film. Some users list it as a favorite, while others criticize it as the worst, ensuring it is a major topic of conversation.

ranked_movies.title: While You Were Sleeping
ranked_movies.reason: Appears on multiple lists of favorites and is specifically called out for its charming lead performance and adorable family dynamic.

ranked_movies.title: Long Shot
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for the powerful female/ordinary male dynamic and praised for being fresh and hilarious.

ranked_movies.title: Before Sunrise
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a favorite for its unique, dialogue-heavy approach to romance, unlike most other films in the genre.

ranked_movies.title: The Proposal
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in the thread for powerful female/ordinary male dynamics and mentioned as a generally popular rom-com.

ranked_movies.title: About Time
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a contender for a favorite romance movie and suggested for those who liked 'La La Land' due to its bittersweet elements.

ranked_movies.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a contender for a favorite romance movie, recognized for its unique and thoughtful take on relationships.

ranked_movies.title: Casablanca
ranked_movies.reason: Named as the 'best' romance movie in the 'AskMen' thread, solidifying its status as a classic must-see.

ranked_movies.title: 27 Dresses
ranked_movies.reason: Appears on a user's list of recently watched and enjoyed films, indicating its enduring popularity in the genre.

ranked_movies.title: She's Out of My League
ranked_movies.reason: Specifically recommended for the dynamic where a powerful female lead falls for an ordinary man, fitting the request perfectly.

ranked_movies.title: Definitely, Maybe
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a favorite in the 'AskMen' thread and suggested for the dynamic where the female lead is more initially invested.

ranked_movies.title: Punch-Drunk Love
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a favorite romance movie by a user in the 'ForeverAloneWomen' sub, indicating its unique appeal.

ranked_movies.title: The Shape of Water
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a favorite by a user who relates to the protagonist, highlighting its impact despite being an unconventional romance.

ranked_movies.title: Howl's Moving Castle
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a happy-ending romance anime movie and listed as a favorite in the 'ForeverAloneWomen' sub.
